tasks.title: Sign in to AWS Management Console

steps.text: Click on the Open Console button, and you will get redirected to AWS Console in a new browser tab.
Leave the Account ID as default. Never edit/remove the 12 digit Account ID present in the AWS Console. otherwise, you cannot proceed with the challenge.
Now copy your User Name and Password in the Lab Console to the IAM Username and Password in AWS Console and click on the Sign in button.
Once Signed In to the AWS Management Console, Make the default AWS Region as US East (N. Virginia) us-east-1.

In this challenge, your Amazon CloudWatch, Amazon EC2, and Amazon SNS skills are put to the test. You'll be given a requirement and you have to reach it using your knowledge of Amazon CloudWatch, Amazon SNS and other services used for this challenge. This Challenge will help you understand the real-time scenarios.

A company XYZ is building their new infrastructure. As a part of the infrastructure, they need to monitor their EC2 instances. As a cloud solution architect, provide a solution that they could be notified when their instance changes their state.
Launch an EC2 Instance having Amazon Linux 2023 kernel-6.1 as AMI, t2.micro as Instance type, and create a Key pair of type RSA required for SSH.
Create a SNS topic and create subscription for that topic as well.
Configure and create a rule for EC2 Instance State.
Add the target as an SNS topic.
Test the CloudWatch Event by stopping the EC2 Instance
Click on the Validate to complete the challenge.
Sign out of the AWS Account.
You have successfully completed the challenge.
Click on End Challenge button from the lab console and wait till the process gets completed.
